title: Inductive Logic Programming (ILP) Rule Learning Process
description: A flowchart depicting the iterative 'generalize-specialize' process for learning a set of Horn clause rules from examples.
relationships: Process begins with a general or specific initial rule
Rule is tested against positive and negative examples
If rule misses positives, it is generalized
If rule covers negatives, it is specialized
Process iterates until rule is consistent with all examples
Final hypothesis is a disjunctive set of all learned rules
